name: Square
description: Sync Square payments, orders, customers, and catalog items into the Shielva knowledge base.

install_fields.label: Square Application ID
install_fields.help: Your Square application ID. From developer.squareup.com → Applications → your app → Credentials.

install_fields.label: Square Application Secret
install_fields.help: Your Square application secret. From developer.squareup.com → Applications → your app → Credentials.

install_fields.label: OAuth Redirect URI
install_fields.help: Optional OAuth redirect URI. Must match the URI registered in your Square application.

methods.name: Install / Authenticate
methods.description: Validate application_id and application_secret. If an access_token is present, probe GET /merchants/me.

methods.name: Authorize
methods.description: Return the Square OAuth2 authorization URL for the configured application.

methods.name: Health Check
methods.description: Probe GET /merchants/me and return HEALTHY, DEGRADED, or OFFLINE with merchant name.

methods.name: Sync Records
methods.description: Full sync of Square payments and customers into the knowledge base.

methods.name: Get Payment
methods.description: Retrieve a single payment by ID.

methods.name: List Orders
methods.description: Search orders for a specific location.

methods.name: Get Customer
methods.description: Retrieve a single customer by ID.

methods.name: List Catalog Items
methods.description: Paginated list of Square catalog objects.

apis.name: Authorize
apis.description: Return the Square OAuth2 authorization URL for the configured app.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Probe GET /merchants/me and return current health with merchant name.

apis.name: Sync Records
apis.description: Sync Square payments, orders (skipped without a location_id), and customers.
